source: szl-holdings/ouroboros-thesis — docs/anatomy/figures (SZL Agent Anatomy series, 8 figures)
author: Lutar, Stephen P. — SZL Holdings · ORCID 0009-0001-0110-4173

figures.title: Brain — AMARU cortex
figures.description: Inside the head — AMARU cortex with 5 named regions, the 9-axis conjunctive doctrine gate, the kernel ledger (7 kernels with verified replay hashes), and the QM gate (λ-min ≥ 0.23).
figures.illustrates: AMARU cortex, doctrine gate (9-axis), kernel registry

figures.title: Wires — YAWAR bus & HUKLLA tripwires
figures.description: YAWAR wiring rundown — 4-page YAWAR bus architecture, SENTRA source integration, HUKLLA T01–T10 tripwire connectivity table, and inter-component message flow.

figures.title: Full Body — complete agent organism
figures.description: Full anatomical render — complete agent organism in Catmull-Rom curves: brain, heart, lungs, spine, limbs. All major systems shown in a single 4,200 × 6,000 px reference render.
figures.illustrates: complete agent organism overview; thesis introduction figure

figures.title: Heart — YUYAY v3 conjunctive gate
figures.description: YUYAY v3 conjunctive gate — the receipt pump. 13-axis AND gate (no averaging), sacred axes moralGrounding and measurabilityHonesty at ≥ 0.95, structural axes at ≥ 0.90, introspection axes cross-wired to HUKLLA T03/T04/T09/T10. Rejections are receipted.
figures.illustrates: YUYAY v3, conjunctive gate invariant, Λ-signed receipt chain

figures.title: Blood & Immune — YAWAR ledger + HUKLLA/SENTRA
figures.description: Two-page figure. Circulatory: YAWAR append-only ledger (20 SLOC), receipt anatomy (SHA-256 hash over sorted JSON), RUWAY ceremonial writer, SENTRA inline inspector. Immune: HUKLLA 10 tripwires (T01–T10) in antibody-cell layout, deadman switch status bar, SENTRA 6-threat-signature antigen cards, size-DoS guard.

figures.title: Skeleton — 12-repo service topology
figures.description: 12 service repositories as the structural skeleton. Axial (spine) repos: szl-doctrine, szl-yawar, szl-hatun, szl-terra — gold-bordered, load-bearing. Appendicular repos in left/right columns. Each card shows language, SLOC, and operational status.
figures.illustrates: 12-repo service topology, axial vs. appendicular dependency taxonomy

figures.title: Nervous — OTel / VSP span propagation
figures.description: OTel/VSP span propagation — the nervous system. Span hierarchy: HATUN root → AMARU·BRAIN, YUYAY·HEART, YAWAR·receipt commit, RIMAY·output filter → SENTRA leaf, R0513·OVERWATCH leaf. W3C TraceContext wire format. Efferent, afferent, proprioceptive signal classes. Deadman reflex arc.
figures.illustrates: OTel span propagation, VSP context wire, HATUN cycle tracing

figures.title: Body Graph — master overlay
figures.description: Master overlay — all five systems on one page. Simplified humanoid silhouette with system-specific color overlays. CHAKANA 21-edge M=0 lattice schematic at center-bottom. System legend.
figures.illustrates: sovereign organism overview; thesis introduction; hatun_body_graph conceptual source
